title: Upon Love
content:
Love scorched my finger, but did spare
The burning of my heart,
To signify in love my share
Should be a little part.

Little I love, but if that he
Would but that heat recall,
That joint to ashes should be burnt
Ere I would love at all.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Love"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
